title: thymus serpyllum var. exserens
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. exserens, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb with tiny leaves and pink or purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Thymus serpyllum var. exserens include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Thymus serpyllum var. exserens can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or added to culinary dishes, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to suit different needs and preferences.
